name: Ambrosia Dessert
recipeIngredient: plastic wrap to cover the bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel 2 oranges and cut them into pieces, then cut each piece across the middle.
2. Peel 2 bananas and slice them thinly.
3. Place some orange pieces in the bottom of the bowl.
4. Sprinkle 1 teaspoon of sugar over the oranges.
5. Add a layer of banana slices on top of the oranges.
6. Sprinkle a little shredded coconut over the banana slices.
7. Repeat steps 3-6 until all fruit is used, alternating between oranges, bananas, and coconut.
8. Top with additional coconut.
9. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
